curation_notes: Re-curation with updated hint guidelines. Patch commit a134e06 fixes two functions that had swapped length and capacity arguments in Vec::from_raw_parts(). Locations derived from the patch diff: guarded_transmute_vec_permissive in src/lib.rs and guarded_transmute_to_bytes_vec in src/to_bytes.rs. Both are the only non-test source files changed. No sibling locations found — no other files in src/ use Vec::from_raw_parts. Vulnerability class buffer-overflow confirmed: CWE-119 maps correctly; the swapped arguments cause the Vec to report more valid data than allocated memory, enabling heap overflow. L3 hints now properly differentiated from L1/L2 per updated guidelines.
